title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple pull/run workflow.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client/SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list models with async support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node, Deno & browsers; same generate/chat/embed API surface.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration layer exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compat endpoint).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library wrapping Ollama’s REST API with fluent builder syntax.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for chatting and generating with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI that wraps Ollama with prompt history and conversation management.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into the editor as inline Copilot suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Next.js chatbot template that connects to Ollama via the OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes for pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client library for Ollama with async enumerable streaming and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service container for CI pipelines needing local LLM calls.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store and LangChain retrieval.

title: ollama-nim-sdk
summary: Nim language wrapper for Ollama REST API with native jsony marshalling and async HTTP.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that answers server questions using local Ollama models and optional slash commands.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts against selected notes via Ollama for summarization or Q&A.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision GPU-enabled AWS EC2 instances with Ollama server pre-installed.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library for Ollama with generate, chat, pull, and embedding methods.
